resign_code.text: สาเหตุพ้นสภาพ

root.sql:
select sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no) as mem_name ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_group(sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no) as member_group_no ,pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name(pka_com_function.fp_get_member_group(sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no)) as member_group_name ,sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no ,sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance ,sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no) as coll_name ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no as coll_group_no ,pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no) as coll_group_name ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.resignation_approve_date) as resignation_approve_date_thai ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_sharestock(sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no) as sharestock ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter(sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no,'1',6)as address_no ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter(sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no,'1',7)as mooban ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter(sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no,'1',8)as moo ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter(sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no,'1',9)as road ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter(sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no,'1',10)as soi ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter(sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no,'1',11)as tambol ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter(sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no,'1',12)as district ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter(sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no,'1',13)as province ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter(sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no,'1',14)as postcode ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter(sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no,'1',15)as telephone ,sc_lon_m_loan_card.contact_status ,sc_mem_m_ucf_resign_cause.resign_cause_name from sc_lon_m_contract_coll ,sc_lon_m_loan_card ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered ,sc_mem_m_resign_requestment ,sc_mem_m_ucf_resign_cause where sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.membership_no = sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no and sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.resign_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_resign_cause.resign_cause_code and sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_type_code = '01' and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code = '3' and sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > 0 and sc_lon_m_contract_coll.status = '0' /*WHERE*/
order by sc_mem_m_membership_registered.resignation_approve_date ,sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no
